task_completion.description: Agent logged into OpenClinica and selected the correct study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or header is visible, showing 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024' as the active study.

task_completion.description: Agent created a 'Query' type discrepancy note for subject DM-101 with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A discrepancy note window or summary for subject DM-101 is visible showing the type as 'Query', status as 'New', and the description containing 'Enrollment date does not match source document'.

task_completion.description: Agent added an 'Annotation' type discrepancy note for subject DM-102 with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A discrepancy note window or summary for subject DM-102 is visible showing the type as 'Annotation' and the description containing 'Informed consent version 3.1 verified'.

task_completion.description: Agent located and opened the existing discrepancy note for subject DM-103.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The discrepancy note view or resolution screen for subject DM-103 is visible, showing the existing issue regarding an unusually high blood pressure value.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the DM-103 discrepancy note status to 'Closed' with the correct closing comment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The discrepancy note for DM-103 shows a status of 'Closed' (or a resolution action indicating closure) and a comment containing 'Verified against source'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenClinica web interface to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica application, rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered the discrepancy note text into the actual OpenClinica form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text inputs for descriptions and comments are seen inside the OpenClinica discrepancy note pop-ups or forms, not in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are open and actively modifying the DOM to display the required text or statuses.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: DM-TRIAL-2024. DM-101 Query Text must contain: 'Enrollment date does not match source document'. DM-102 Annotation Text must contain: 'Informed consent version 3.1 verified'. DM-103 Close Text must contain: 'Verified against source'.
